question: How many days ago did I attend a baking class at a local culinary school when I made my friend's birthday cake?
ground_truth_answer: 21 days. 22 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
User has been really into baking lately.
User attended an amazing baking class at a local culinary school yesterday, which sparked a strong obsession with strawberries and inspired User to plan a strawberry shortcake using fresh strawberries from the farmer's market, and User is seeking tips for whipping cream that is light, fluffy, and holds its shape
User just baked a chocolate cake for a friend's birthday party today that turned out amazing, using a new recipe found online that used espresso powder to intensify chocolate flavor.
User is also thinking of making lemon bars for the dinner party, wants tips for making a shortbread crust, and recently made a batch with a shortbread crust and lemon curd made with fresh lemons and eggs, which turned out tangy and sweet.
User is hosting a dinner party next weekend and is looking for new recipe ideas for a unique dessert.
User is excited to try making croissants again, and also wants to make banana bread for the dinner party; recently made a batch with walnuts that turned out amazing.
User loves matcha tiramisu and salted caramel chocolate tart, and has experimented with strawberries, making a strawberry rhubarb crisp a few weeks ago that was incredible.
User is experimenting with sourdough starter to make a sourdough shortcake, has decided to use bread flour first after having good results with it in cookies, and plans to monitor proofing time and adjust liquid content accordingly
User wants a savory dish to complement the sweet treats.
User wants tips for making moist and flavorful banana bread.
